name: stackra/refund
purpose: Refund lifecycle — Refund + RefundLine aggregates for full and partial refunds of prior payments and invoice lines.
capabilities: Refund aggregate (rfd_ prefix) — per-tenant refund root
when_to_use: A customer receives a refund initiated by the tenant, either full or per-line-item.
when_not_to_use: For customer-initiated disputes against the tenant, use stackra/chargeback.
